subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Thy letter hath been received. Although physical afflictions cause bewilderment to the human soul, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت نامه شما رسید عوارض جسمانی هر چند سبب حیرانی انسانی است ولی چون
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
